raw_text:
FIRST INFORMATION REPORT
(Under Section 154 Cr.P.C.)

FIR No: 245/2024
Date: 15/03/2024
Police Station: Andheri
District: Mumbai
State: Maharashtra

Act: Indian Penal Code
Sections: 420, 467, 468, 471, 120B

Complainant Name: Rajesh Kumar Sharma
Father's Name: Mohan Lal Sharma
Address: 45, MG Road, Andheri West, Mumbai - 400058
Phone: +91 9876543210

Accused Name: Vikram Singh Rathore
Address: Unknown

Brief Facts:
The complainant states that the accused cheated him of Rs. 5,00,000 by forging property documents and presenting them as genuine. The accused created fake sale deed documents bearing forged signatures of the original property owner.

The incident occurred on 10/03/2024 at approximately 3:00 PM at the Sub-Registrar Office, Andheri.

Action Taken: FIR registered under sections 420, 467, 468, 471, 120B of IPC.
Investigation handed to SI Pradeep Patil.

Signature of Officer
SI Pradeep Patil
Andheri Police Station
